title: DM Command Team Takes the PT Test
summary: Airmen assigned to the 355th Wing participated in a diagnostic physical training test alongside wing leadership to evaluate recently updated fitness standards at Davis-Monthan Air Force Base, April 15, 2026.

title: DM50 Picnic and Car Show
summary: The DM50 picnic and car show brought together service members, their families and the Tucson community for a day of connection April 11, 2026.

title: That Others May Live: The unwavering commitment of Air Force combat search and rescue
summary:
In the U.S. Air Force, no phrase carries more weight than "That Others May Live." It is not merely a motto; it is a commitment that underpins the existence of the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) mission.         

This solemn promise to leave no one behind, whether a downed pilot in enemy territory

title: Increase in aircraft noise around DMAFB
summary: DAVIS-MONTHAN AIR FORCE BASE, Ariz. – F-16 aircraft and personnel assigned to Holloman Air Force Base, New Mexico will be training out of Davis-Monthan Air Force Base, Arizona from April 10 to May 15.

title: New Mission Ready Airmen program strengthens deployment readiness
summary: DAVIS-MONTHAN AIR FORCE BASE, Ariz. — U.S. Airmen at Davis-Monthan Air Force Base are expanding their deployment readiness through the Mission Ready Airmen program, an initiative designed to prepare service members for the challenges they may face in deployed environments.

title: 355th Wing commanders explore leadership lessons during offsite In Gardner Canyon
summary: DAVIS-MONTHAN AIR FORCE BASE, Ariz. -- Leaders from across Davis-Monthan Air Force Base’s 355th Wing gathered for an offsite focused on strengthening relationships, building morale and preparing for future challenges in Gardner Canyon, Arizona, March 23-24, 2026.

title: DM hosts a Senior Selects Professional Enhancement Seminar
summary: The 355th Wing hosted a Professional Enhancement Seminar to prepare newly selected senior master sergeants for the transition into one of the Air Force’s most demanding leadership roles March 25–27, 2026.

title: A-10 Makes Final Luke Days Appearance
summary: A-10C Thunderbolt II aircraft from Davis-Monthan Air Force Base performed a combat arms demonstration at the Luke Days Air Show at Luke AFB, Arizona, March 22, 2026–marking their final Luke Days appearance as the aircraft divests and pilots transition to the F-35A Lightning II and other Air Force as

title: 355th MXG Religious Support Team wins ACC's RST of the year
summary: For the second consecutive year, the 355th Maintenance Group Religious Support Team has earned top honors as Air Combat Command’s Religious Support Team (RST) of the year and is now competing at the Air Force level.

title: DM Welcome Basket Initiative
summary: The 355th Wing launched a welcome basket initiative to provide essential household items to incoming dorm Airmen, helping them settle into their rooms and feel welcomed upon arrival to their first duty station.

title: Pharmacy services relocate to BX during Davis-Monthan clinic renovation
summary: DAVIS-MONTHAN AIR FORCE BASE, Ariz. – Due to an ongoing renovation project, the 355th Medical Group’s main pharmacy, located at the clinic at Davis-Monthan Air Force Base, Arizona, was closed March 2, 2026, with all services now offered exclusively at the satellite campus inside the Base Exchange.<b

title: DM rescue units reinforce Agile Combat Employment during Exercise Red Flag-Rescue 26-1
summary: Airmen from the 55th and 48th Rescue Squadrons strengthened their ability to execute personnel recovery operations in contested environments during Exercise Red Flag-Rescue 26-1 in San Diego, California, Feb. 13-20.

title: Leadership Lessons: Former SEAC 4 visits DM to inspire the next generation of Airmen
summary: Retired Senior Enlisted Advisor to the Chairman Ramón "CZ" Colón-López, visited Davis-Monthan Air Force Base Feb. 19 and 20 to share his leadership philosophies with Airmen across the installation.

title: 355th LRS conducts special operations refueling tryouts
summary: Airmen assigned to the 355th Logistics Readiness Squadron participate in Forward Area Refueling Point team tryouts at Davis Monthan Air Force Base, Arizona, Feb. 13, 2026. FARP teams across the Air Force are responsible for conducting special operations refueling missions.
